properties.titulo_evento: Doodle Labs eyes US, European production sites as demand soars for jam-resistant drones
properties.descricao: Doodle Labs hopes to turn its success in equipping jam-hardened drones in Ukraine into additional production sites in Europe and he United States.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel’s IAI unveils ‘Hypnosis’ system for confusing enemy drone swarms
properties.descricao: The system, called Hypnosis, consists of an array of mobile “stations” around a defended area that send out jamming signals against drone swarms.

properties.titulo_evento: Corruption Takes Center Stage in Ukraine’s National Conversation
properties.descricao: Welcome to The Ukraine Compass, a weekly digest of Ukrainian commentary and analysis from across the political spectrum only for War on the Rocks members. Each Monday, we bring you a curated selection of articles from Ukrainian medi...

properties.titulo_evento: Lebanese president set to meet Trump as Beirut seeks Israeli withdrawal
properties.descricao: Aoun is in Washington, DC seeking US backing to end the fighting and secure an Israeli withdrawal from southern Lebanon.

properties.titulo_evento: Arizona’s primary elections: Which US races to watch and why they matter
properties.descricao: From the governor’s race to Democratic divisions over Gaza, here’s what could shape Arizona elections on Tuesday.

properties.titulo_evento: Lebanon’s Joseph Aoun to meet Trump: What to expect
properties.descricao: The Lebanese president is seeking Washington's support for his agenda, including diplomacy with Israel.

properties.titulo_evento: Huge fire at Ukraine shopping centre after Russian drone strike
properties.descricao: A fire engulfed a shopping centre in Ukraine's Sumy after Russian drone strikes hit the building.

properties.titulo_evento: Argentina deny World Cup villains’ role after Samuel Jackson-led slants
properties.descricao: Hollywood actor Samuel L Jackson was among those who criticised Argentina at World Cup, with racism among allegations.

properties.titulo_evento: Hormuz tankers on fire, as US, Iran continue attacks: What’s the latest?
properties.descricao: The White House told Al Jazeera that the US would continue its attacks unless Trump decides otherwise.

properties.titulo_evento: Farage, Reform in ‘trouble’, as UK braces for crypto influence in politics
properties.descricao: Farage's crisis after revelations of substantial crypto donations prompts broader political questions over donor clout.

properties.titulo_evento: Five Palestinians killed in fire after Israeli attack in Gaza
properties.descricao: An Israeli air attack on an apartment in Gaza City set the building on fire, killing five people.

properties.titulo_evento: ‘We just want to live’: Palestinians in Gaza react to Hamas election
properties.descricao: There are mixed reactions in Gaza after Khalil al-Hayya is elected Hamas leader.

properties.titulo_evento: China and Philippines trade accusations after sailor injured at sea
properties.descricao: Dispute erupts in South China Sea after incident near Second Thomas Shoal involving Chinese and Philippine vessels.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
properties.descricao: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

properties.titulo_evento: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
properties.descricao: Iran says it has hit two ships in the Strait of Hormuz as well as targets in Bahrain and Jordan.

properties.titulo_evento: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader
properties.descricao: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran's IRGC claims attack on Amazon's main data hub in Bahrain
properties.descricao: The IRGC claimed its cruise missiles destroyed Amazon's central data infrastructure in Bahrain and hit US air defence systems. Bahraini, US and Amazon officials have not responded.

properties.titulo_evento: Drone strike sparks major fire in Sumy, northeastern Ukraine
properties.descricao: A home improvement shopping centre in Sumy, Ukraine, catches fire after a reported Russian FPV drone strike as firefighters battle the blaze.

properties.titulo_evento: Tanker attacked in Strait of Hormuz as US strikes Iran for tenth consecutive night
properties.descricao: As fighting escalates between both sides, Iran's interior minister travelled to Pakistan, a key mediator in the conflict, for talks.

properties.titulo_evento: Yemen’s Houthis threaten Bab el-Mandeb closure in embargo on Saudi Arabia
properties.descricao: The Iran-backed Houthis declared a maritime embargo on Saudi Arabia after accusing the kingdom of attacking Sana'a airport and maintaining a years-long blockade, putting one of the world's busiest shipping lanes at risk.

properties.titulo_evento: IRGC pledges 'unforgettable lesson' for US as Iran signals return to talks
properties.descricao: The Revolutionary Guard told Ayatollah Khamenei it regarded his message as "a binding command," as Iran's foreign ministry said diplomacy remained open and mediators sought a 10-day ceasefire to revive the framework deal.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine fires 400 drones at Moscow as Russia steps up ballistic missile attacks
properties.descricao: Ukraine's latest attack follows a weekend of escalating exchanges between the two sides, with Russia targeting Kyiv with ballistic missiles on Sunday and Ukraine hitting warehouses outside of Moscow on Saturday.

properties.titulo_evento: Chaos erupts in Buenos Aires after Argentina's World Cup final defeat
properties.descricao: Riot police use water cannon in Buenos Aires after Argentina's World Cup final defeat to Spain, as protests break out in the capital.

properties.titulo_evento: US hits Iran for ninth night as Khamenei calls ceasefire 'worthless'

properties.titulo_evento: Trump and Sánchez meet at World Cup final after nearly two years of diplomatic tensions
properties.descricao: For nearly two years, the leaders of Spain and the United States have clashed over issues ranging from defence spending to US policy in the Middle East.

properties.titulo_evento: Rodri reveals the secret behind Spain's run to the World Cup final
properties.descricao: Spain's captain says La Roja owe their success to the bond between coach De la Fuente and the squad, and warns Argentina are 'the team to beat', 'much more than Messi'.

properties.titulo_evento: China, Philippines clash in South China Sea ahead of ASEAN meeting
properties.descricao: China and the Philippines traded accusations after a violent altercation between navy personnel in the disputed South China Sea. The incident heightened tensions ahead of a major diplomatic summit in Manila.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: US launches fresh strikes as Trump vows revenge
properties.descricao: The US has launched strikes on Iran for a 10th consecutive night as both sides vie for control of the Strait of Hormuz. US President Trump has promised revenge over the deaths of fallen American troops. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia says bus strike kills 5 in border region with Ukraine
properties.descricao: The strike comes as Ukraine launched more than hundreds of drones at Moscow after a Russian missile barrage on Kyiv, as President Zelenskyy sought to calm growing tensions over Ukraine’s military leadership.

properties.titulo_evento: Why a 90-year-old treaty limits NATO in the Black Sea
properties.descricao: A 90-year-old treaty still shapes the balance of power in the Black Sea. As Ukraine fights on against Russia, can NATO project power into waters it can't enter freely?

properties.titulo_evento: Spain won the World Cup, but Donald Trump 'cast a shadow'
properties.descricao: Though Donald Trump mostly stayed clear of stadiums, the World Cup may influence the US midterm elections. DW looks at the political implications of "the most successful sporting event maybe in the history of the world."
